method: COMMENT_EVALUATION 2026-06-03 — each item evaluated on text, not broad cluster_link. Researcher-approved 2026-06-03 (119/120->M26, 158->M30 route-to-cluster).

new_observations.title: Hatred as a constitutive inner orientation (sin.ah)
new_observations.description: sin.ah (hatred) is listed alongside love and envy as a constitutive inner orientation of the person that ceases at death (group 902-003). The pointer makes an anthropological claim: hatred is a fundamental inner capacity defining relational existence. Adopted into M06 (Hatred, char 84) as a cluster observation from gating flag DIM-75-SD001 (id 133).
